audio_hardware.clock_config: FUN_08129144 computes SAI clock dividers using FP math

firmware_architecture.cm4_role: SAI/DMA configuration, GPIO setup, peripheral management, HSEM sync
firmware_architecture.cm7_role: Audio DSP processing (float/short/NEON), no direct peripheral access
firmware_architecture.fx_core: DSP56362, separate binary, no STM32 peripheral access
firmware_architecture.inter_core: No HSEM/IPCC/AXI SRAM references detected by Ghidra - likely indirect pointer access

cm7.FUN_080359f4: Largest function (18232B) - likely main audio DSP

findings.spi_sai_dac_mystery: SAI found (SAI2 at 0x40015800) but was previously missed because ref_scan searched I2C addresses, not SAI. The function FUN_08129a98 was misidentified as I2C1 - it's actually SAI init.
findings.no_i2c_codec: No I2C references detected in CM4. Audio codec may be SPI-controlled, always-on hardware-default, or controlled via FX core.
findings.no_codec_strings: No audio codec chip names (AK/WM/CS/PCM/TLV/ES) found in any binary.
findings.cm7_no_peripheral_refs: CM7 has zero SAI/DMA/HSEM/IPCC/SRAM references - all access is through indirect pointers.
findings.audio_gpio: SAI2 uses PE4/5/6 (AF6) for ChA, PD11/12/13 (AF10) for additional audio. Total 11 GPIO pins identified for audio.
findings.dma_channels: 3 DMA2 streams (0, 4, 7) used for audio - likely TX, RX, and a third channel (codec control or monitoring).
